fields.name: numUsers
docs: Data used to calculate the rewards of the user

fields.name: totalStakedAmount
docs: The number of token in the `farm_vault` staked (getting rewards and fees)
Set such as `farm_vault.amount = total_staked_amount + total_pending_amount`

fields.name: delegateAuthority
docs: Only used for delegate farms
Set to `default()` otherwise

fields.name: timeUnit
docs: Raw representation of a `TimeUnit`
Seconds = 0, Slots = 1

fields.name: isFarmFrozen
docs: Automatically set to true in case of a full authority withdrawal
If true, the farm is frozen and no more deposits are allowed

fields.name: isFarmDelegated
docs: Indicates if the farm is a delegate farm
If true, the farm is a delegate farm and the `delegate_authority` is set*

fields.name: isRewardUserOnceEnabled
docs: If set to 1, indicates that the "reward user once" feature is enabled

fields.name: withdrawAuthority
docs: Withdraw authority for the farm, allowed to lock deposited funds and withdraw them
Set to `default()` if unused (only the depositors can withdraw their funds)

fields.name: depositWarmupPeriod
docs: Delay between a user deposit and the moment it is considered as staked
0 if unused

fields.name: withdrawalCooldownPeriod
docs: Delay between a user unstake and the ability to withdraw his deposit.

fields.name: totalActiveStakeScaled
docs: Total active stake of tokens in the farm (scaled from `Decimal` representation).

fields.name: totalPendingStakeScaled
docs: Total pending stake of tokens in the farm (scaled from `Decimal` representation).
(can be used by `withdraw_authority` but don't get rewards or fees)

fields.name: totalPendingAmount
docs: Total pending amount of tokens in the farm

fields.name: slashedAmountCurrent
docs: Slashed amounts from early withdrawal

fields.name: lockingMode
docs: Locking stake

fields.name: isFarmDelegated
docs: Indicate if this user state is part of a delegated farm

fields.name: rewardsTallyScaled
docs: Rewards tally used for computation of gained rewards
(scaled from `Decimal` representation).

fields.name: rewardsIssuedUnclaimed
docs: Number of reward tokens ready for claim

fields.name: activeStakeScaled
docs: User stake deposited and usable, generating rewards and fees.
(scaled from `Decimal` representation).

fields.name: pendingDepositStakeScaled
docs: User stake deposited but not usable and not generating rewards yet.
(scaled from `Decimal` representation).

fields.name: pendingDepositStakeTs
docs: After this timestamp, pending user stake can be moved to user stake
Initialized to now() + delayed user stake period

fields.name: pendingWithdrawalUnstakeScaled
docs: User deposits unstaked, pending for withdrawal, not usable and not generating rewards.
(scaled from `Decimal` representation).

fields.name: pendingWithdrawalUnstakeTs
docs: After this timestamp, user can withdraw their deposit.

fields.name: bump
docs: User bump used for account address validation

fields.name: delegatee
docs: Delegatee used for initialisation - useful to check against

fields.name: rewardsIssuedCumulative
docs: Cumulative rewards issued to the user - ONLY used for stats/analytics
DO NOT USE IN ANY CALCULATIONS
Old userStates will have this field populated only from the point of release
not reflecting any historical data before this was released

fields.name: points
docs: This is a stepwise function, meaning that each point represents
how many rewards are issued per time unit since the beginning
of that point until the beginning of the next point.
This is not a linear curve, there is no interpolation going on.
meaning that from t0 to t1, 100 rewards are issued per time unit,
from t1 to t2, 50 rewards are issued per time unit, and after t2 it stops
Another curve, can be [[t0, 100], [u64::max, 0]]
meaning that from t0 to u64::max, 100 rewards are issued per time unit
